calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Feb-23-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hee Kim for and with Marjorie Brown.

Ms. Kim stated that all interest parties being contingent beneficiaries including the charities have consented, that the Attorney General has waived notice, referred to language in the Trust and spoke of the power of the Trustee. Ms. Kim also stated that they are ready to make distribution to the children but that one is a minor, that they will miss out on the step up if they don't wait until the Trustor passes, spoke of adverse administrative costs if the house is kept in the Trust and spoke of the Brown's relationship with the minors. The Petition for Order Approving Modification of Trust is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Chu. Not reported.

Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Continued To Jan-23-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hee Sun Kim for (petitioner) Marjorie Brown.

The Court asked why it should excuse notice to the Attorney General. Ms. Kim responded that both charities have consented and that they need to contact the Attorney General, that in regards to the examiner's notes the couple was married for 5 decades with no issue, that there is 3 million in the trust, that it trust B is funded it will be with 1.5 million, that the remainder beneficiaries are charities and close friends, that they do not want to spend additional funds for a Guardian ad Litem, that in regards to trust B contributions have been made to the two charities, that everyone consents to the petition and that they want to avoid the cost of two trusts. The Petition for Order Approving Modification of trust was continued to January 23, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
